nasb.text: It is in my power to do you harm, but the God of your father spoke to me last night, saying, ‘Be careful not to speak either good or bad to Jacob.’

esv.text: It is in my power to do you harm. But the God of your father spoke to me last night, saying, ‘Be careful not to say anything to Jacob, either good or bad.’

cnv.text: 我本來有能力可以傷害你，但昨天晚上，你們父親的　神對我說：‘你要小心，不可與雅各說甚麼。’

ccb.text: 我有能力伤害你，但你父亲的上帝昨夜对我说，‘你要小心，不可对雅各多说什么。’

csbs.text: 我手中虽有能力加害于你们，但你父亲的神昨夜对我说：‘你要小心，不可与雅各说好说歹。’
